generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I can tell you: cutting defense budgets now would be a grave mistake. The alliance is only as strong as its weakest link. We've seen what happens when nations shirk their commitments. Remember 2022? The world is more dangerous than ever. Our allies need to see we're serious about collective security. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
